summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ELS MHD Step 03 - Patient Management. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all core functionality including patient list, KPI tiles, filter chips, QuickEntryBar with keyboard shortcuts, PatientDialog, delete confirmation, and Command Palette integration.
seed_data_creation: Created test patients via keyboard shortcuts and dialog during testing. Test incident TEST_Patient_Incident was created and cleaned up by pytest.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Patient API fully tested with pytest. Frontend tested with Playwright for: patient list display, KPI tiles (total, S1-S4, wartend, behandlung, transport), filter chips (sichtung S1-S4, status alle/wartend/in_behandlung/transportbereit/uebergeben/entlassen), QuickEntryBar with keyboard shortcuts (1=S1, 2=S2, 3=S3, 4=S4, N=dialog), PatientDialog for create/edit, delete confirmation modal, Command Palette with Patienten group, 'Kein Incident aktiv' state when no incident selected. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented. Existing demo incident MANV-Uebung Sued (712ca18e) has test patients P-0001 through P-0005.

backend: POST /api/incidents/{id}/patients without payload creates patient with status=wartend, kennung=P-XXXX
POST with sichtung=S1 creates patient with sichtung=S1, status=in_behandlung, sichtung_at+behandlung_start_at set
POST with sichtung=S2/S3/S4 creates patients correctly
Auto-Kennung is sequential per Incident (P-0001, P-0002, ...)
PATCH with sichtung on unsichtiert patient sets sichtung_at+behandlung_start_at
DELETE Incident removes all associated patients (cascade delete)
frontend: Navigation to /patienten WITHOUT active incident shows 'Kein Incident aktiv' (patients-no-incident)
With active incident shows PatientList (patient-list-title), QuickEntryBar (quick-entry-bar), KPI tiles
Keyboard shortcuts NOT triggered when focus is in input/textarea (search field)
KPI tiles update after patient creation (kpi-total, kpi-s1, kpi-s2, kpi-s3, kpi-s4, kpi-beh)
Filter chips (filter-sichtung-S1..S4, filter-status-*) filter the DataTable
Click on DataTable row (patient-row-{id}) opens Edit dialog with preset data
Delete button (patient-delete-{id}) opens ConfirmModal, cancel works
Sidebar 'Patienten' is active when incident selected, disabled (INAKTIV) otherwise
Command Palette (Ctrl+K) shows 'Patienten' group with each patient as entry
QuickEntryBar S1-S4 buttons create patients correctly
PatientDialog allows selecting sichtung, status, verbleib, and adding notes
